section.heading: Treatment of incentive fees for landlords of housing units for failure to remedy health or environmental hazards

content.p: The Secretary concerned shall not approve the payment of incentive fees otherwise authorized to be paid to a landlord that the Secretary determines has demonstrated a pattern of failing to remedy, or failing to remedy in a timely manner, a health or environmental hazard at a housing unit provided by the landlord.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 116–92, div. B, title XXX, § 3021, Dec. 20, 2019, 133 Stat. 1931; amended Pub. L. 116–283, div. B, title XXVIII, § 2811(f), Jan. 1, 2021, 134 Stat. 4324.)
